title: sphaeroma incanum
intro: Sphaeroma incanum is a type of plant also known as 'White Ball' or 'Cotton Ball Plant', and it belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sphaeroma incanum include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or ointments for topical use, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine.
